name: Marina's Beef-Rice-Peach Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the peaches and reserve the syrup, then cut the peach slices in half.
2. Mix together the beef, bread crumbs, beaten eggs, onion, dill weed, salt, pepper, and 1/3 cup of peach syrup until well combined.
3. Combine the cooked rice with parsley and 1 tablespoon of peach syrup.
4. Place the meat mixture on waxed paper as a rectangle measuring 14 x 10 inches, about 3/4-inch thick.
5. Spread the rice mixture evenly over the meat. Stir nutmeg into the peaches and distribute them evenly over the meat.
6. Roll up the meat in an elongated roll from one short side of the rectangle to enclose the filling, forming a pinwheel loaf. Press down on the edges at both ends of the loaf.
7. Place the loaf seam-side down on a rack in a roasting pan. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 1 hour. Brush with peach syrup and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
8. Let stand for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
